mapper.sql: id, parent_id, ancestors, module_code, module_name, module_type, route_path, component_path, icon, sort, nav_visible, stateful_flag, state_field_code, context_version, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note
mapper.select: select from sys_module where id = #{id}

select id, parent_id as parentId, module_code as moduleCode, module_name as moduleName, module_type as moduleType, route_path as routePath, component_path as componentPath, icon, sort, nav_visible as navVisible, stateful_flag as statefulFlag, status from sys_module order by sort asc, id asc
select from sys_module order by sort asc, id asc
select from sys_module where module_code = #{moduleCode} limit 1
select count(1) from sys_module where parent_id = #{parentId}

select id, module_id, component_code, component_name, sort, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note from sys_module_component where module_id = #{moduleId} order by sort asc, id asc
select count(1) from sys_module_component where module_id = #{moduleId}

select f.id, f.module_id, f.component_id, c.component_code, f.field_code, f.default_title, null as display_title, null as placeholder, null as help_text, f.component_type, f.data_path, f.value_type, f.required_flag, f.sort, f.status, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time, f.note from sys_module_field f inner join sys_module_component c on c.id = f.component_id where f.module_id = #{moduleId} order by c.sort asc, f.sort asc, f.id asc

select t.field_id as id, t.module_id, t.component_id, t.component_code, t.field_code, t.default_title, t.display_title, t.placeholder, t.help_text, t.component_type, t.data_path, t.value_type, t.required_flag, t.sort, t.status, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.note from sys_module_field_title t inner join sys_module_component c on c.id = t.component_id where t.module_id = #{moduleId} and t.locale = 'zh_CN' order by c.sort asc, t.sort asc, t.field_id asc

select f.id, f.module_id, f.component_id, c.component_code, f.field_code, f.default_title, null as display_title, null as placeholder, null as help_text, f.component_type, f.data_path, f.value_type, f.required_flag, f.sort, f.status, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time, f.note from sys_module_field f inner join sys_module_component c on c.id = f.component_id where f.id = #{id}

select f.id, f.module_id, f.component_id, c.component_code, f.field_code, f.default_title, null as display_title, null as placeholder, null as help_text, f.component_type, f.data_path, f.value_type, f.required_flag, f.sort, f.status, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time, f.note from sys_module_field f inner join sys_module_component c on c.id = f.component_id where f.module_id = #{moduleId} and f.field_code = #{fieldCode} limit 1
select count(1) from sys_module_field where module_id = #{moduleId}
select count(1) from sys_module_field where component_id = #{componentId}
select id, module_id, button_code, default_title, sort, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note from sys_module_button where module_id = #{moduleId} order by sort asc, id asc
select count(1) from sys_module_button where module_id = #{moduleId}

select id, module_id, state_code, state_name, sort, is_initial, is_final, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note from sys_module_state where module_id = #{moduleId} order by sort asc, id asc

select t.id, t.module_id, t.action_button_code, b.default_title as action_button_name, t.from_state_code, t.to_state_code, t.sort, t.status, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.note from sys_module_transition t left join sys_module_button b on b.module_id = t.module_id and b.button_code = t.action_button_code where t.module_id = #{moduleId} order by t.sort asc, t.id asc
